data.title: UFP Industries Highlights Growth and Margin Expansion Plans
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

UFP Industries ( (UFPI) ) has shared an announcement.

UFP Industries presented its fourth quarter 2024 Investor Relations Presentation, highlighting a focus on driving above-market growth and expanding margins over time. The company has achieved a 30% average annual total shareholder return over the past five years and aims to sustain a 12.5% adjusted EBITDA margin. UFP Industries is committed to innovation, with plans for product and process innovation, and leveraging technology to enhance productivity and efficiency.

More about UFP Industries

UFP Industries operates in the construction, retail, and industrial packaging sectors, primarily focusing on converting softwood lumber into value-added products used globally in various applications. The company is North America’s largest buyer of softwood lumber and has a significant scale advantage in sourcing and servicing residential construction, retail building products, and industrial packaging markets.

Average Trading Volume: 288,397

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

data.title: AtlasClear Holdings Delays Q4 2024 Report Filing
data.description:
AtlasClear Holdings ( (ATCH) ) has released a notification of late filing.

Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

AtlasClear Holdings, Inc. has announced a delay in filing their Form 10-Q (Quarter Report) for the financial period ending December 31, 2024. The primary reason for the delay is the need for additional time to finalize the company’s financial statements, which could not be completed without unreasonable effort or expense. The company anticipates filing the delayed report within five calendar days following the prescribed due date. Importantly, AtlasClear Holdings does not expect any significant changes in financial results for the period compared to the previous fiscal year. The company is actively working to ensure compliance with all regulatory requirements. The notification was signed by John Schaible, the Executive Chairman, on February 18, 2025.

More about AtlasClear Holdings

YTD Price Performance: -71.46%

Average Trading Volume: 88,581

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: $1.06M

data.title: BCE Inc. Bolsters Financial Position with Major Bond Issuance
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

BCE ( (TSE:BCE) ) has provided an update.

On February 18, 2025, BCE Inc. announced a significant financial move through its subsidiary, Bell Canada, with the issuance of US$2.25 billion in fixed-to-fixed rate junior subordinated notes due in 2055. This issuance includes US$1 billion in Series A Notes and US$1.25 billion in Series B Notes, guaranteed on a junior subordinated basis by BCE Inc. This strategic financial maneuver, underwritten by major financial institutions such as BofA Securities and Citigroup Global Markets, is aimed at strengthening Bell Canada’s financial position and market competitiveness. The issuance is part of a broader effort to leverage favorable market conditions and secure long-term capital, potentially impacting stakeholders by enhancing the company’s capacity to invest in network improvements and expand service offerings, thereby solidifying its industry position.

More about BCE

BCE Inc. is a major player in the telecommunications industry, primarily offering services through its subsidiary, Bell Canada. The company focuses on providing communication services, including fixed-line and wireless telephony, internet services, and digital television, across Canada.

Average Trading Volume: 3,980,639

data.title: Lexston Mining Corporation Secures $196,000 in Private Placement
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Lexston Life Sciences Corp. ( (TSE:LEXT) ) has shared an announcement.

Lexston Mining Corporation announced the successful closure of a non-brokered private placement, raising $196,000 through the issuance of 2,450,000 units. These funds will be used for general working capital, and the securities issued are subject to a four-month hold period. This move indicates Lexston’s ongoing efforts to bolster its financial position and support its mineral exploration projects in Canada.

More about Lexston Life Sciences Corp.

Lexston Mining Corporation is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on the acquisition and development of mineral projects in British Columbia and Nunavut, Canada. The company aims to enhance value for stakeholders and trades on the OTCQB Venture Market, which caters to early-stage and developing U.S. and international companies.

data.title: ValOre Metals to Acquire South Atlantic Gold, Creating Major Precious Metals District in Brazil
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

South Atlantic Gold ( (TSE:SAO) ) has issued an update.

ValOre Metals Corp. has announced its intent to acquire South Atlantic Gold Inc., aiming to create a vast 99,924-hectare precious metals district in Ceara State, Brazil. This strategic acquisition is designed to leverage the synergies between ValOre’s and South Atlantic’s projects, both named Pedra Branca, which are closely aligned in terms of geology and infrastructure. The merger is expected to unlock significant value for shareholders and positively impact local communities, with ValOre’s access to capital and experienced team poised to advance the development of this promising region.

More about South Atlantic Gold

data.title: Inmobiliaria Colonial Proposes Merger with Subsidiary SFL
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

The latest update is out from Inmobiliaria Colonial ( (ES:COL) ).

Inmobiliaria Colonial has announced plans for a potential merger with its subsidiary Société Foncière Lyonnaise (SFL), setting an exchange ratio of 13 Colonial shares for each SFL share and an exit price of 77.5 euros for dissenting shareholders. This merger, subject to various approvals, aims to streamline operations and enhance Colonial’s market position, with financial advisement from Morgan Stanley and Rothschild & Co.

More about Inmobiliaria Colonial

Inmobiliaria Colonial is a leading real estate company operating in the European market, primarily focusing on the management and development of high-quality office properties. The company is recognized for its significant presence in major cities, including Paris, Madrid, and Barcelona, catering to a range of clients seeking premium office spaces.
